description: Crafted from leather, this black wallet from turtle is fabulously stylish and well organized. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. You'll not only enjoy the practical use of the wallet, but you can also rest easy knowing that you're supporting a company who care about the Earth. The brand has a great program in place for saving sea turtles in Orissa. Dimensions: 10 cm x 12 cm Has two main compartments with fabric lining for durability Credit card and id card slots with a flap for space Three insert pockets One zipped compartment on the right for coins Branding embossed on the top Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
